chunks.title: Vow of Silence and Anguish
chunks.reason: The psalmist describes his initial vow to guard his speech and the resulting internal anguish that led him to speak.

chunks.title: Reflection on Human Transience
chunks.reason: A prayer asking for awareness of life's brevity and a description of human existence as vanity and shadow.

chunks.title: Petition for Deliverance
chunks.reason: The psalmist pleads for relief from transgressions and the plague of God's hand, acknowledging divine chastisement.

chunks.title: Final Plea for Mercy
chunks.reason: A concluding prayer asking God to hear his cry and grant a moment of joy before death.
